    Login

    Log In to WarwickSU.com

    Warwick Students

    If you're a student at the University of Warwick, you should log in to the Warwick SU website using your IT Services username and password.

    Log in using your University ITS account
    Alumni/Guests

    Not a student at the University of Warwick? If you're a member of the public, Warwick alumni, student at another university or University staff, you can create a Warwick SU account and use it to purchase tickets for events, associate memberships and products in our online shop.

    If your account was created after the 05/09/2023, your Username will be your email address, so please use this when logging in.

    Warwick SU Staff

    If you're a Warwick SU staff member, please log in using your @warwicksu.com Microsoft email address and password.

    About Warwick SU

    The Students’ Union is the focal point of campus life here at Warwick, but what exactly is it that makes your Union so unique? Find out more about the SU and what we do.

    Contact Us

    We only exist to provide services for our members, so your feedback really is important to us.

    Get in touch with your questions, comments and complaints and we’ll get back to you within three working days.
